context.meal: breaded fish bites, roasted potatoes, tartar sauce
context.setting: Watching TV with TV on Right

episode_text:
day=1; meal=breaded fish bites, roasted potatoes, tartar sauce; setting=Watching TV with TV on Right; time_of_day=morning;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=parallel to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=outside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=near; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV on the user's right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility toward the right-side TV.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF feeding foods that require fork skewering AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any skewered food, THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE the user has limited mouth opening and narrower bites are more compatible with that physical constraint.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user can lean forward comfortably and explicitly selected the less intrusive transfer style.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN near BECAUSE the user selected a close stopping distance while still preferring outside-mouth transfer.

convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN speech BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred spoken readiness cues.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user has reliable arm control, can press buttons easily, and limited mouth opening makes open-mouth readiness less suitable.

IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user has reliable arm control and explicitly preferred direct manual signaling.

IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user has reliable arm control and explicitly preferred direct manual signaling.

convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN speech BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred spoken completion cues.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF feeding task AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN perception BECAUSE the user selected the reliable automatic completion method for bites.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF drinking task AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user preferred explicit manual completion signaling rather than automatic completion.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF mouth wiping task AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user preferred explicit manual completion signaling rather than automatic completion.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV on the user's right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN yes BECAUSE the user chose to reduce prolonged visual obstruction in a context where right-side visibility matters.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is the observed TV-watching context, THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to avoid dipping despite tartar sauce being available.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF dining context is a routine meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the user preferred a short timeout, consistent with favoring efficient progression when explicit button controls are available.
